title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.1937 - Safekeeping of county permanent records — accounting records and annual audit
text:
67.1937.  Safekeeping of county permanent records — accounting records and annual audit. — The governing body of the county shall provide for the proper and safekeeping of its permanent records.  It shall keep a true and accurate account of its receipts and an annual audit shall be made of its books, records and accounts.
(L. 2001 S.B. 323 & 230)
